ACTIVATE_REMOTE_USER_ERROR: There was an error while de-/activating the user.
ADD_DEVICE_INFO_1: On your System M, go to 'Settings', then 'Registration'.Enter the UID PIN shown there here:
ADD_DEVICE_INFO_2: Please name your System M(e.g. 'Home - Munich'):
ADMIN_ONLY: These functions are only accessible for the user groups after-sales service and installers.
APPLE_PRIVATE_EMAIL_WARNING: You didn't share the email id during the login process. This is the primary contact information in case of any issues in your system. Please update your email address.
APPLIANCE_FIRMWARE_UPDATE_AVAILABLE_PUSH: An update of the device software is available. You can request a tan on the unit and start the update via the app.
APPLIANCE_FIRMWARE_UPDATE_INFO: You need a code to start the update. You can request this on the display of the device. The update can take up to 2 hours. In the meantime, the device restarts several times. Please do not switch off the device during the update.
APPLIANCE_FIRMWARE_UPDATE_ROLE_NOT_ENOUG: An update of the device software can only be started by the system operator or service user.
APPLIANCE_FIRMWARE_UPDATE_RUNNING: Uploading the software to the device
APPLIANCE_FIRMWARE_UPDATE_TAN_DESCRIPTIO: Please use the following code to start the update inside of the system settings in the Dimplex Home App: __TAN__ The code has a validity of 10 minutes.
APPLIANCE_FIRMWARE_UPDATE_TAN_ERROR: The update code could not be generated. Please try again later.
APP_CLOSING_INFO: For security reasons, the app will be closed. Please open the app to log in again.
AUTHENTICATION_LOCAL_MESSAGE: In order to connect, you have to have registered in the app with your user account once.
AUTO_UPDATE_DESC: Your system will be updated automatically as soon as a new version is available.
BYPASS_TEMP_INFO_1: From the set temperature, the heat exchanger is “bypassed” and the outside air is fed directly into the building.
BYPASS_TEMP_INFO_2: Usual values are from 20 °C (bring cold into the building as much as possible) to 25 °C (keep heat in the building as much as possible)
CHANGE_CURRENT_DEVICE_INFO: This action changes the current system selection. Do you want to continue?
CHECK_HOST_IP: Please check the entered IP address (__ip_address__) of the device.
CLOUD2_WHITELISTED: The update for your System M has been activated. Now perform the following steps to use the new __DIMPLEX_HOME_LINK__ app: Start the update on the System M display (The update can take several hours. Do not switch off your system during this time and ideally perform the update at night. Your heat pump continues to operate as usual during this time). Download the Dimplex Home App from the App-Store. Register in the Dimplex Home App. Unfortunately, your existing GDTS Home Account cannot be used for data protection reasons anymore. Create a tan for coupling on the System M display in the "Registration" tile. Use the tan from the heat pump display to couple the device in the Dimplex Home App. Please note that after the update has been carried out the use of the GDTS Home App is no longer possible!
CLOUD2_WHITELIST_EXPLANATION: Glen Dimplex has a new app: __DIMPLEX_HOME_LINK__. This makes controlling your heat pump faster, more intuitive and safer. To use the new app you only need to update your System M and install the new __DIMPLEX_HOME_LINK__ app. After that, you will no longer be able to use the GDTS Home app. Do you want to unlock your system to use the new app?
CL_KD_CHECK: System check performed according to customer service instructions
CL_REMOTE_CONN: Online access set up and LAN cable inserted
CL_ROOM_TEMP: Room temperature control available and checked
CL_VOLUME_FLOW: Volume flow in generator circuit above minimum hot water throughput: Enter set volume flow
COMFORT_TEMPERATURE_INFO: Above the set temperature, the outside air is fed directly into the building. Usual values are from MIN_TEMP ° (bring cold into the building as much as possible) to MAX_TEMP ° (keep heat in the building as much as possible).
COMMISSIONING_ASSIGNMENT_CONFIRM_INFO: The commissioning configuration is the reference point for the handover to the operator. You can only change the feature with the after-sales service password.
COMMISSIONING_SUBMIT_ERROR: An error occurred while transmitting the commissioning protocol. Please try again.
COMMISSIONING_SUCCESS: The commissioning certificate has been successfully transferred.
CONFIG_DISABLED_INFO: This function has been disabled by the installer! To enable the function, please contact the installer
CONFIG_ERROR: An error occurred while saving the configuration. Please try again.
CONFIG_FINISHED: The configuration is complete and can now be saved.
CONFIG_SIMULATED: This is a simulation, the configuration is not saved.
CONFIRM_ACCEPT_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_INFO: Would you like to allow the following access for the external partner?
CONFIRM_ADVERTISING: Yes, I would like to receive tailored information via the specified communication channels (e.g. e-mail, telephone).
CONFIRM_AS_ADMIN: Please confirm yourself as the main user.
CONFIRM_DECLINE_EXTERNAL_ACCESS_INFO: Would you like to delete the following access for the external partner?
CONFIRM_DELETE: Delete USER? This action can not be undone.
CONFIRM_DISCARD_APPLE_EMAIL_CHANGE: Are you sure not to update your email contact information?
CONFIRM_ERROR_INFO: Before confirming a fault, the reason for the fault must be eliminated on the spot. The heat pump can be damaged by frequent fault confirmation. Do you want to confirm the fault now?
CONFIRM_LOGOUT_INFO: Do you really want to logout?
CONFIRM_NETATMO_DEACTIVATION: Are you sure you want to disable Netatmo from your device?
CONFIRM_PRIVACY: Yes, I agree that my personal details may be logged, processed and used in accordance with the data protection declaration.
CONFIRM_ROLE_CHANGE: Are you sure you want to add USER to main users?

COOLING_TO_LIMIT_INFO: Cooling mode activated until the outdoor temperature falls below TEMP for DUR h.
COULD_NOT_RESET_CONNECTION: The network connection could not be reset. Reloading application.
CREATE_PROFILE_INFO: Schedules for thermal disinfection, domestic hot water preparation and comfort.
DATA_PROTECTION_INFO: The responsible party as per the General Data Protection Regulation, other data protection laws valid in the member states of the European Union and other regulations relating to data protection, is: Glen Dimplex Germany GmbH Management Am Goldenen Feld 18 95326 Kulmbach You can contact our data protection agent at: Email: datenschutz@glendimplex.de Further data protection declaration: https://glendimplex.de/en/privacy End User License Agreement: EULA
DEACTIVATE_BYPASS_INFO: To prevent heat loss, this function is activated after a defined time.
DELETE_DEVICE_ERROR: The system could not be deleted.
DELETE_LAST_PROFILE_MESSAGE: At least one profile must exist.
DELETE_REMOTE_USER_ERROR: An error occurred while removing the user.
DEMO_MODE_ERROR: This functionality is not available in demo mode
DESCRIPTION_EMPTY_WARNING: The description should not be empty.
DEVICE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED: Not supported by the currently selected device.
DEVICE_LIST_ERROR: The device list could not be downloaded.
DEVICE_OPERATINGMODE_CHANGE_PUSH_CONTENT: Your system has been permanently set to the manual operating mode __OP_MODE__. If you want automatic operating mode switching, please switch back to automatic mode, which switches the operating mode depending on the outside temperature.

Your ventilation has been switched off. This may cause the air quality to deteriorate. If you want automatic air quality-dependent adjustment of the ventilation, please set the ventilation to automatic mode.
DEVICE_SETUP_INFO: To change the system setup, use the EasyOn setup assistant.
DEVICE_UNAVAILABLE_INFO: Cannot connect to the device. Please check that the device is connected to the network.
DEVICE_UNAVAILABLE_INFO_APP: Your system is currently not available. Please check the network connection of the system on site. The app will not be able to inform you about a possible malfunction.
DEVICE_UNAVAILABLE_IN_DEVICE_LIST_INFO: Your previously selected device is no longer available. Please select a device from the device list.
DISABLE_ACCESS: This action will disable the user (USER) to access your heat pump. Do you want to continue?
DISABLE_OWN_ACCESS: This action deactivates your only access to the heat pump. Only the operator of the heat pump releases your access again. Do you want to continue?
DISCARD_CHANGES: Your changes have not yet been saved. Do you want to save or discard the changes?
DISCLAIMER_01: If you provide your mobile number and e-mail address, we can usually help before a fault occurs. Please keep this information up-to-date.
DISCLAIMER_02: Texts can also be viewed at gdts.one/datenvereinbarung.
DISCONNECTING_LOCAL: The W-LAN “GDTS Hotspot” is removed from your Smart-Device.
DISPLAY_ERROR_INFO: The system has identified a display problem.To guarantee the display quality, the display module is re-loaded and the process logged when the "Reload" button is pressed.
DYNAMIC_COOLING_INFO: With dynamic cooling (e.g. via fan convectors), the room temperature is controlled decentrally. Cooling can be deactivated centrally at adjustable times and days via the weekly profile.
EDIT_DATA_01: Archive and create new operating data
EDIT_DATA_02: Change owner/operator and delete all data
EDIT_DATA_03: Change owner/operator and retain the weekly schedules
EDIT_DATA_04: Change owner/operator and retain the weekly schedules and historic operating data
ENABLE_ACCESS: This action will allow the user (USER) to access your heat pump. Do you want to continue?
ENTER_SERIAL: Please enter the serial number in the heat pump manager and restart the device.
ERROR: An error has occurred. Please try again.
ERROR_CODE_401: You request is unauthorized. Please contact your system operator.
ERROR_CODE_500: Unknown error occurred. Please restart the App.
ERROR_INVERTER_EMERSON_SYSTEM_BIT_0_INFO: Set after 30s in case that the drive has not received any data frame.
ERROR_INVERTER_EMERSON_SYSTEM_BIT_11_INF: Compressor code is not defined in EEPROM / Power cycle needed.
ERROR_INVERTER_EMERSON_SYSTEM_BIT_1_INFO: Internal data transfer issue between DSP and EEPROM.
EXISTING_OWNER_WARNING: As soon as a new system operator couples with the heat pump, the existing system operator is downgraded to user.
EXPERT_MODE_INFO: You are currently using the free Dimplex Home App. With this premium function, the system operator / service / technician can set up the heating curve in the advanced view, which also provides additional functions, such as graphical analysis and the connection of up to 10 systems.
EXTERNAL_ACCESS_INFO: Requests to access your device data from external services or service partners
EXTERNAL_API_APPROVAL_REQUEST_NOTIFICATI: The user __EMAIL__ has requested device data access. Please check the request in the app.
EXTERNAL_API_SCOPE_ExternalDeviceDhwWrit: Change of the hot water parameters
EXTERNAL_AUDIENCE_2fd27674-d8c7-4d0c-818: Allows the access to device data from external services
EXTERNAL_AUDIENCE_7fa74a03-d8fd-4487-9f9: Allows the access to device data from the Coqon service system
FAULT_0.6_INFO: The electronic expansion valve is not recognised.
FAULT_0.6_SOLUTION: The installer contacts after-sales service if necessary.
FAULT_1.2_SOLUTION: The installer contacts after-sales service if necessary.
FAULT_1.3_INFO: The communication between the refrigeration circuit controller and heat source controller is faulty.
FAULT_1.3_SOLUTION: Check the communication between the refrigeration circuit controller and heat source controller.
FAULT_1.9_INFO: A fault has been caused by the fan motor protection.
FAULT_1.9_SOLUTION: The installer contacts after-sales service if necessary.
FAULT_1_INFO: The communication between the heating controller and refrigeration circuit controller is faulty.
FAULT_1_SOLUTION: Check the communication between the heating and refrigeration circuit controller.
FAULT_2.1_INFO: The system pressure in the brine circuit is too low.
FAULT_2.2_INFO: The domestic hot water temperatures cannot be reached.
FAULT_2.2_SOLUTION: Check the throughput of the domestic hot water circulating pump, the heating check valve and the domestic hot water sensor.
FAULT_2.3_INFO: A load compressor fault is triggered.
FAULT_2.3_SOLUTION: Check the rotary field, phase failure, compressor operating current and soft starter overtemperature.
FAULT_2.5_INFO: The heat source is producing low amounts of energy.
FAULT_2.5_SOLUTION: Clean the dirt trap filter, purge the heat source system, check the water flow and evaporator.
FAULT_2.6_INFO: The flow temperature in heating mode operation is below 7°C.
FAULT_2.8_INFO: The heat pump cannot deliver the generated output to the heating system.
FAULT_2.8_SOLUTION: Set heating curve lower, increase heating water flow rate and check overflow valve.
FAULT_2.9_INFO: Temperature between flow and return is too great (>12 K) or negative for the initiated defrosting.
FAULT_2.9_SOLUTION: Check the heating water flow rate, overflow valve, pump size, as well as the flow and return.
FAULT_2_SOLUTION: Check the system temperatures, system pressures and volume flow.
FAULT_3.1_INFO: The heat pump has been switched off because there is no flow in the heating circuit.
FAULT_3.1_SOLUTION: Insufficient water flow in well or brine circuit, clean dirt trap filter and check the flow direction.
FAULT_3.2_INFO: The heat pump has been switched off because there is no flow in the heat source circuit.
FAULT_3.2_SOLUTION: • Insufficient water flow in well or brine circuit • Clean dirt trap filter • Incorrect flow direction
FAULT_3_INFO: There is a hot gas temperature fault.
FAULT_3_SOLUTION: The installer contacts after-sales service if necessary.
FEEDBACK_DESCRIPTION: Questions / Feedback / Recommendations about Dimplex Home App
GET_TOKEN_ERROR: Unable to load System M UID PIN.
GRAPHICAL_VIEW_OPTION_1: Finger gestures for zooming and moving.
GRAPHICAL_VIEW_OPTION_2: The __legend_Edit__ option allows you to edit the chart view by selecting check boxes.
GRAPHICAL_VIEW_OPTION_3: The __download_csv__ option enables downloading the data in Excel.
Glen Dimplex hat eine neue App: __DIMPLE: The update for your System M has been activated. Now perform the following steps to use the new __DIMPLEX_HOME_LINK__ app: Start the update on the System M display (The update can take several hours. Do not switch off your system during this time and ideally perform the update at night. Your heat pump continues to operate as usual during this time). Download the Dimplex Home App from the App-Store. Register in the Dimplex Home App. Unfortunately, your existing GDTS Home Account cannot be used for data protection reasons anymore. Create a tan for coupling on the System M display in the "Registration" tile. Use the tan from the heat pump display to couple the device in the Dimplex Home App. Please note that after the update has been carried out the use of the GDTS Home App is no longer possible!
HEATING_CIRCUITS_INFO: The heating / cooling circuit can be renamed
HEATING_TO_LIMIT_INFO: Warm weather shutdown activated (heating system disabled) when outdoor temperature exceeds TEMP for DUR h.
HISTORICAL_DATA_INFO: You are currently using the free Dimplex Home App. To access graphical evaluations of the system data, you need the Premium version, which contains additional functions such as the coupling of up to 10 further systems.
HOTSPOT_CHANGE_FAIL: The hotspot could not be changed.
HOTSPOT_CONNECTION_FAIL: No connection to the hotspot could be established.
INFO_FUNCTION_HEATING: This program is a recognized function test for underfloor heating according to DIN EN 1264-4 and is carried out after the prescribed waiting time for concrete flooring.
INFO_FUNCTION_HEATING_MAX_TEMP: Temperature: Sets the maximum return flow temperature to be reached during initial heating.
INFO_P_AHP_DIFF_AB: Sets the temperature difference between the two steps in the heating-down phase.
INFO_P_AHP_DIFF_AUF: Sets the temperature difference between the two steps in the heating-up phase.
INFO_P_AHP_MAX_TEMP: Temperature: Sets the maximum return flow temperature to be reached during initial heating.
INFO_P_AHP_ZEIT_AB: Sets the duration (in hours) of the individual steps during the heating-down phase.
INFO_P_AHP_ZEIT_AUF: Sets the duration (in hours) of the individual steps during the heating-up phase.
INFO_P_AHP_ZEIT_HALT: The number of hours that the maximum set temperature is maintained.
INFO_READY_FOR_LAYING_HEATING: This program is used to reduce the moisture in the concrete flooring to such an extent that the floor covering can be laid. The moisture content must be measured, however.
INPUT_UID: Please enter the System M UID PIN.
INSTALL_FAILED_INFO: The installation of the new plug-in failed. Please try again and contact __connectivity__ if the installation is no longer successful.
INTERVAL_UPDATE_ERROR: The profile interval could not be updated.
INVALID_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: The default password of the plugin has been changed. Please enter the changed password.
INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid e-mail address.
INVALID_PROFILE_SETTING_ERROR: The weekly profile was changed with the app. Since the app has extended functionality further changes has to be done in the app. Alternatively you can reset the weekly profile and edit it here.
INVALID_VALUE_WARNING: The input value must be between __MIN__ and __MAX__.
LIMIT_INFO: The MODE operation mode is active between the heating operation mode and the cooling operation mode.
LIMIT_INFO_COOLING: Conventional values are from TEMP_MIN (passive house) to TEMP_MAX (old buildings)
LIMIT_INFO_HEATING: Conventional values are from TEMP_MIN (passive house) to TEMP_MAX (old buildings)
LINKED_ALREADY: You have already connected with this system.
LOAD_REMOTE_USERS_ERROR: An error occurred while loading the list of users.
LOCAL_DEVICE_SEARCH: Search for device in the local hotspot
LOCAL_DEVICE_SEARCH_FAILED: No device found. Please check whether the local hotspot of the device is active and that your smart device is connected with this hotspot.
LOCAL_MODE_ERROR: Local mode could not be started.
LOCAL_TAN_REQUEST_FAILURE: No tan could be generated because the unit has been running too long. A tan can only be retrieved within the first 10 minutes after starting the gateway.
LOCK_0.5_INFO: Function control was activated manually and will be automatically deactivated after 30 minutes.
LOCK_0.7_INFO: System control was activated manually and will be automatically deactivated after 24 hours.
LOCK_0.8_INFO: The delay protects the heat pump when switching between a cooling request and a domestic hot water request.
LOCK_0.9_INFO: The heat pump starts after the pump flow has expired.
LOCK_1.1_INFO: The line load is required by utility companies and can last up to 200 seconds after the voltage is restored or after a utility block.
LOCK_1.2_INFO: The switch cycle block is required by utility companies and can last up to 20 minutes.
LOCK_1.3_INFO: Domestic hot water reheating the second heat generator is active.
LOCK_1.4_INFO: Heating and domestic hot water preparation is carried out using the renewable cylinder.
LOCK_1.5_INFO: There is a block from the utility company. The utility block can last up to 2 hours.
LOCK_1.6_INFO: The heat pump startup was prevented due to impermissible mains voltages. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_1.7_INFO: The heat pump has been switched off because there is no flow in the heating circuit. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_1.8_INFO: The heat pump was blocked because the operating limit was reached. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_1.9_INFO: The heat pump was blocked because the operating limit was reached. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_1_INFO: The heat pump starts automatically after the minimum pause time.
LOCK_2.1_INFO: The heat pump was blocked because the operating limit was reached. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_2.2_INFO: The 4-way valve has not reset to its initial state after defrosting. The heat pump block will be lifted when the permissible operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_2.3_INFO: The heat pump was blocked because the operating limit was reached. The block will be lifted when the system temperatures are over 18°C.
LOCK_2.4_INFO: The heat pump has been disabled via the motor protection. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_2.5_INFO: The heat pump has been disabled via the digital input. Frost protection is guaranteed.
LOCK_2.6_INFO: The communication between the heating controller and refrigeration circuit controller is interrupted. The block is lifted if the communication is restored.
LOCK_2_INFO: The heat pump was blocked because the operating limit was reached. The block will be lifted when the operating conditions have been met.
LOCK_3.4_INFO: The heat pump was blocked manually. The block will be lifted if the 2nd heat generator is deactivated manually.
LOG_IN_REQUIREMENTS: The Glen Dimplex Home App requires a connection to a Dimplex Heat Pump. You must provide a valid email address for registration.
MAC_OR_SERIAL_NOT_FOUND: The entered MAC or NWPM serial number was not found. Please check the information you entered.

MISSING_PREMIUM_FEATURES: Your Dimplex Home app is missing some of the above features. To activate all Premium features, please proceed with the one-time purchase.

P_ZUP_HUP: Parameter Auxiliary pump Heating circulation pump
RECONNECTING: The original internet connection is established again.
REMOVE_ACCESS_AND_LOGOUT: Remove an access and log out of the system
REMOVE_ACCESS_AND_SET_MAIN_USER_AND_LOGO: Set a new main user, remove an access and log out of the system
REMOVE_OWN_ACCESS_INFO: If you delete the main user, you will be permanently blocked from accessing this system.
RENAME_DEVICE_ERROR: The system could not be renamed.
REQUESTS_PENDING: There are outstanding actions. Please try again later.
RESET_FAILED: An e-mail could not be sent to reset the password.
RESET_MAX_WW_TEMP: Reset domestic hot water self-learning immersion heater activation temperature
RESET_MAX_WW_TEMP_INFO_1: Depending on the outdoor temperature, the System M calculates the maximum domestic hot water temperature that can be reached in pure heat pump operation.
RESET_MAX_WW_TEMP_INFO_1_V2: Depending on the outdoor temperature, the System M calculates the maximum domestic hot water temperature that can be reached in pure heat pump operation.
RESET_MAX_WW_TEMP_INFO_2: This learning automatically sets the activation temperature of the DHW immersion heater.
RESET_MAX_WW_TEMP_INFO_3: Do you really want to clear the automatically-calculated DHW immersion heater activation temperatures and restart the self-learning?
RESET_SUCCESS: An e-mail was sent with a link to reset the password.
RESET_UNKNOWN: This e-mail address is not known. An e-mail could not be sent to reset the password.
RESET_WW_ERROR: An error occured while trying to reset the warm water temperature.
ROOMS_INFO: Rooms with a thermostat can be named and assigned a system profile.
SEARCH_DEVICE_LOCAL: Pair device without a touch display
SELECT_ROLE: Please select the role for which a tan is to be generated
SERVER_UNAVAILABLE_INFO: Could not reach the server. Please try again at a later time.
SESSION_EXPIRY_INFO: Your session is expired. Please restart the app to continue.
SETTING_UPDATE_ERROR: The profile setting could not be updated.
SET_TIME_ERROR: An error occured while setting the time.
SET_TIME_MODE_ERROR: An error occured while changing modes.
SILENT_MODE_INFO: Silent mode lowers the heat output and efficiency by 5 %. Domestic hot water should not be scheduled in silent mode to reduce energy consumption.
SILENT_MODE_NEW_INFO: The Silent Mode reduces the heat output and efficiency by approx. 5%. In order to compensate for the reduced heat output, the hot water preparation should be set via the time programs so that it takes place preferably in times of high heat output and efficiency.
SINGLE_ROOM_TEMPERATURE_INFO: This room is reporting a request to the heat pump.
START_DEMO: Start the app in demo mode.
SUCCESS_PLUGIN_INSTALL_INFO: The plugin has been successfully updated in your system. The system is automatically connected to the Cloud.
TAN_INFO: Please input the two 5 digit TAN numbers from your device here.
TAN_INFO_TEXT: To connect, please enter the displayed TAN in the Dimplex Home App.
TAN_PAYMENT_ERROR: You are currently using the free Dimplex Home app. For the coupling of additional systems you need the premium version, which provides additional functions, such as graphical analysis and expert mode.
TELL_UID: Name the person to be authorized
TERMS_INITIAL_DIALOG: To use this app, you have to accept our __PRIVACY_TERMS_LINK__ and our __EULA_LINK__.
TERMS_INITIAL_DIALOG_V2: To use this app, you have to accept our __PRIVACY_TERMS_LINK__.
TERMS_REFUSE_DIALOG: The app may only be used if you accept our privacy terms and the end user license agreement.
THERMAL_DESINFECTION_INFO: Sets the start time for the thermal disinfection. The heating period is terminated automatically when the set temperature is reached, at 12:00 p.m. or after 4 hours at the latest.
THERMAL_LOCK_INFO: Block the domestic hot water preparation during absence or solar thermal system/photovoltaics.
THEROSTAT_INFO: The target temperature is set by the thermostat. Please use the thermostat to adjust.
TIME_CHANGE_INFO: To change the system time, please select the desired time zone.
TIME_OVERLAP_AUTO_CORRECTION_POPUP: Overlaps between two time intervals are not permitted. The overlapping intervals are automatically reset for better performance.
TITLE: Title
TRANSACTION_FAILED: Failed to activate the feature, please contact the support with the following order information:
UHI_FUNCTION: Please use this function directly on the UHI.
UHI_UPDATE_ERROR: An error occurred while installing the UHI update.
UID_VALIDITY_INFO: This code is valid for DUR minutes.
UNINSTALL_FAILED_INFO: Uninstalling the old plug-in failed. Please try again and contact __connectivity__ if the installation is no longer successful.
UPDATE_INSTALLATION: Updates are being installed. Please do not switch off the device.
UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS_DONT_CLOSE_APP: The update is in progress. Please do not close the app.
UPDATE_NECESSARY: This update includes so many new and improved functions, that the software of your GDTS Home System M also needs updating. This process will take approx. 15 minutes and can not be interrupted. Carry out the update on the touch panel via Settings > Software Update.
UPDATE_NOT_FOUND: It was not possible to establish a connection to the update server. Please check your network connection.
VENT_BASIC_LEVEL_AS_TIME_PROGRAM_WARNING: Time program __INTERVAL__ has the same ventilation level. Please select another level in the time program __INTERVAL__ or deactivate time program __INTERVAL__.
VENT_BASIC_LEVEL_IN_TIMEPROGRAM_WARNING_: Do you really want to deactivate the time program __INTERVAL__ ?
VENT_BASIC_LEVEL_WARNING: You cannot select the default ventilation level as a time program level. Please change the default level under ventilation general menu.
VENT_BASIC_LEVEL_WARNING_V2: The ventilation level __LEVEL__ is not available for the time programmes because it has already been selected as the basic level.
VENT_FILTER_ASSISTENT_CONFIRM_INFO: Confirm the installation of the new filter and reset the filter counter to activate the ventilation again.
VENT_FILTER_ASSISTENT_SHUTDOWN_INFO: The ventilation is switched off for the filter change.
VENT_FILTER_ASSISTENT_START_REPLACEMENT: Start the filter change + reset counter
VENT_FILTER_REPLACEMENT_CONFIRM_INFO: The ventilation then returns to the mode operation and the counter is reset.
VENT_FILTER_REPLACEMENT_CONFIRM_INSTRUCT: Confirm when the filter has been replaced.
VENT_FILTER_REPLACEMENT_WARNING_CONTENT: To ensure optimal air quality, it is necessary to change the filter of the ventilation. Please perform the filter change promptly and confirm it in the app.
VENT_NEXT_PROFILE_INFO: After the time has expired, the following profile is activated:
VENT_OPERATION_TYPE_ACTIVE_PROFILE_INFO: The System M ventilation is controlled via time profiles. The current active profile is:
VENT_PROFILE_LEVEL_CHANGE_INFO: The change of the level is only valid until the next change of the level by the set weekly profile.
VENT_PROFILE_RESET_WARNING: It appears that the time program is activated in the ventilation module. This is not compatible with the app time program. You must reset the time program from the ventilation module in order to be able to use app time programs. Are you sure you want to reset the time program in the ventilation module?
VENT_TIME_PROGRAM_LEVEL_AS_BASIC_LEVEL_W: The ventilation level in the __INTERVAL__ time program does not differ from the current ventilation level. Therefore, it is not possible to activate the time program. Please change the fan level of the time program first.
WARNING_DELETE_OWN_GRANT: Do you really want to delete your own access to the heat pump? This cannot be reverted
WARNING_RESET_ENERGY_COUNTER: Do you really want to reset __CONFIG__ counter?
WHAT_DEVICE: What type of system do you have?
WPM_UPDATE_ERROR: An error occurred while installing the WPM update.
WPM_UPDATE_SUCCESS: The WPM software was updated successfully.
YOUR_GDTS_ID_INFO: A connection to a System M heat pump is required to use the GDTS Home App.
